title: Back to the Future (Save the Cat)

notes.text: Marty McFly is introduced as a bright but unfocused teen in a restless small-town life.
Doc hints that choices can reshape destiny, not just inherit it.
Marty's family dynamic and school frustrations establish what he wants to escape.
Doc's DeLorean experiment goes wrong when Marty is forced to flee in the time machine.
Marty realizes he is trapped in 1955 and must navigate unfamiliar rules.
Marty commits to getting back to 1985 by teaming up with younger Doc.
B-story thread: helping his father become confident and win Lorraine authentically.
Comic and emotional set-pieces around school, romance, and Biff build momentum.
At the dance, timing and romance collide: Marty nearly erases himself before correcting the timeline.
Storm, sabotage, and last-minute failures threaten both the lightning plan and timeline repair.
Marty appears to lose Doc and his chance to return, with stakes at maximum.
Dark reflection: maybe the future is fixed and he cannot save anyone.
Marty executes the final plan and returns to 1985 with hard-earned clarity.
Doc survives, the family timeline improves, and Marty sees change is possible.
Final image mirrors the opening life but transformed: confidence, momentum, and new possibility.
